title: Add proxy field to AppConfig
description:
Add proxy: Option<String> to AppConfig in cli/src/config.rs so proxy URLs can be read from config.toml.

## What
Add a proxy field to the AppConfig struct that deserializes from config.toml key 'proxy'.

## Algorithm
1. Open /home/mark/WORK/nie/cli/src/config.rs
2. In the AppConfig struct, after the lightwalletd field, add:
   /// SOCKS5 proxy URL for relay connection (e.g. socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050).
   /// socks5h:// is required for .onion addresses (proxy resolves DNS).
   pub proxy: Option<String>,
3. No other changes needed — serde #[derive(Deserialize)] + toml::from_str handles the rest.
4. Run: cargo build -p nie-cli exits 0.

## Defensive programming rules
- Field type is Option<String>, not a parsed URL type — parsing happens in main.rs validation
- Never add Debug logging of this field value (it may contain credentials in future)
- If existing tests snapshot AppConfig output, update them to include the new field

## Agent team
Single implementer (one-line struct addition)

## Tests
Acceptance: unit test that AppConfig::load() correctly deserializes proxy = 'socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050' from a temp TOML file into Some(String); also test that missing proxy key deserializes to None.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-cli exits 0; deserialization test passes for proxy field presence and absence
